greetings.morning: Good morning. What relationships are on your heart today?
greetings.afternoon: Good afternoon. How has your community shown up for you today?
greetings.evening: Good evening. Take a moment to notice — who did you encounter today?
greetings.return: Welcome back. Your relational garden has been waiting for you.
greetings.firstTime: Welcome. I'm here to help you see your people more clearly — not to replace your judgment, but to deepen your attention.

prompts.followUp: You haven't connected with {{name}} in {{days}} days. Would you like to reach out?
prompts.reflection: It's been a rich week. Would you like to pause and reflect on what you've noticed?
prompts.journeyMilestone: {{name}}'s journey has reached a new chapter. Take a moment to acknowledge how far you've come together.
prompts.seasonalInvitation: As {{season}} unfolds, consider: what is being planted, growing, harvested, or resting in your relationships?
prompts.dormantConnection: {{name}} has been quiet for a while. Sometimes silence is peaceful. Sometimes it's a call. What do you sense?
prompts.gratitude: Before you close for the day — is there someone you're grateful for? Even a silent prayer of thanks is a form of care.
prompts.communityNeed: A need has surfaced in your network: {{need}}. You may be in a position to help — or to connect someone who can.

insights.connectionTrend: Your relational network has {{trend}} this month. {{interpretation}}
insights.interpretationGrown: New seeds have been planted. Tend them well.
insights.interpretationSteadied: Consistency is its own kind of faithfulness.
insights.interpretationQuieted: Stillness can be fruitful. But check — is anyone waiting to hear from you?
insights.topConnections: Your deepest connections this month: {{names}}. These are your inner garden.
insights.neglectedArea: Your {{area}} relationships could use some attention. Even a small gesture goes a long way.

encouragement.afterLogging: Logged. The small acts of attention are the ones that matter most.
encouragement.afterReflection: Thank you for pausing. Reflection is the soil in which wisdom grows.
encouragement.afterJourneyUpdate: Another chapter written. The story continues.
encouragement.afterProvision: A need met, a connection strengthened. This is community.
encouragement.milestoneReached: You've reached {{milestone}}. This is the work of patient, faithful presence.

narrativeStudio.title: Narrative Studio
narrativeStudio.subtitle: Stories emerging from the work you're already doing.

emergingStories.heading: Emerging Stories
emergingStories.tooltipWhat: Lightweight story scaffolds assembled from your value moments
emergingStories.tooltipWhy: See what stories are forming from your daily work
emergingStories.emptyTitle: Stories will grow as you work.
emergingStories.emptyMessage: Reflections, events, and journey movements weave into narrative over time.

storyThreads.heading: Story Threads
storyThreads.tooltipWhat: Individual value moments detected from your activity
storyThreads.tooltipWhy: Each moment is a thread that weaves into your larger story
storyThreads.emptyMessage: No story threads yet. They emerge as you reflect, attend events, and build relationships.

toasts.noMoments: No moments to build from yet.

narrativeThreads.title: Narrative Threads
narrativeThreads.subtitle: The story gathers quietly from moments your team has recorded.

threadCard.citationsIntro: This is a thread built from moments your team recorded — reflections, visits, and small signs of change.
threadCard.noCitedMoments: No cited moments for this thread.

narrativeThreads.emptyThisWeek: The story gathers quietly here. As your team records visits, reflections, and relationships, the threads begin to form.

dashboard.title: Your garden awaits
dashboard.message: Every great garden begins with a single seed. Add your first relationship and watch your community come alive.

relationships.title: No one walks alone
relationships.message: The people in your life are your greatest treasure. Begin by adding someone you walk alongside.

journeys.title: Every journey begins with a single step
journeys.message: Journeys capture the unfolding story of your relationships. Start one and let the narrative grow.

events.title: The community is gathering
events.message: Subscribe to local event feeds or add your own. The pulse of your community starts here.

volunteers.title: Many hands, one mission
volunteers.message: Begin coordinating those who serve. Every hour given is a gift to the community.

provisions.title: Give and receive with grace
provisions.message: Track the tangible ways your community provides for one another. No need is too small.

reflections.title: Be still and know
reflections.message: Reflection turns experience into wisdom. Pause, notice, and let the quiet speak.

interactions.title: Presence is the first gift
interactions.message: Every conversation, every visit, every prayer — log the moments that weave your community together.

communio.title: Communio
communio.subtitle: Opt-in narrative sharing between CROS workspaces

profileBanner.message: Share your presence with the network
profileBanner.description: Join the Communio directory so neighboring organizations can discover you.

noGroups.heading: No groups yet
noGroups.description: Communio lets you share anonymized narrative signals with neighboring organizations. Create or join a group to start building shared community awareness.

signals.empty: No shared signals yet. As organizations in your groups share narrative insights, they'll appear here.

events.empty: No collaboration events yet. When partner organizations share events, they'll appear here.

caregiverNetwork.title: Caregiver Network
caregiverNetwork.subtitle: A quiet space for mutual support and companionship
caregiverNetwork.safetyMessage: This network is for companionship and practical support. Never share private details about the people you care for. All messaging is mediated — your contact info stays private unless you choose to share it.

impulsus.title: Impulsus
impulsus.subtitle: A quiet record of the relationships I'm growing.

principles.perspective: second person — always speaking to the user as a trusted companion
principles.avoid: sales language, urgency, manipulation, gamification, metrics obsession

spring.invitation: Spring is a time of new beginnings. What new relationships are budding? What dormant connections are stirring?
spring.reflection: As the earth awakens, so does opportunity. Plant intentionally.

summer.invitation: Summer calls us outward. Your community is flourishing — who needs your presence in this season of abundance?
summer.reflection: Growth is happening all around you. Pause to notice and celebrate it.

autumn.invitation: Autumn is the season of harvest and gratitude. What fruits have your relationships borne this year?
autumn.reflection: Gather what has grown. Give thanks. Prepare for the quieter season ahead.

winter.invitation: Winter invites us inward. This is a season of rest, reflection, and quiet faithfulness.
winter.reflection: Not all growth is visible. The deepest roots grow in silence.

liturgical.advent: Advent reminds us that the best things come to those who wait with expectation. Who are you waiting with?
liturgical.christmas: The light has come. In this season of gift and joy, who can you bring light to?
liturgical.lent: Lent calls us to simplicity and renewal. What in your relational life needs pruning? What needs deeper roots?
liturgical.easter: He is risen. In this season of resurrection, what relationships are being made new?
liturgical.ordinary: Ordinary time is anything but ordinary. Faithful presence, day after day, is the most extraordinary thing you can offer.
